description_long: This object features a large, circular mesh or fabric disc held within a thick, rounded frame, mounted vertically on a sturdy cylindrical stand with a broad, stable base. Attached to the stand is a small, cylindrical component connected by a green cable, suggesting an electronic function. The disc appears to be a filter or screen, possibly for audio or communication purposes, with a fine mesh texture visible on its surface. The frame and base are made of a glossy, black material, likely plastic or metal, giving the object a modern, utilitarian appearance. The green cable adds a visual accent and connects the main body to the smaller component, which may serve as a control or sensor. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for placement on a desk or workstation in an urban environment.
description: A circular mesh disc in a thick black frame, mounted on a stand with a green cable connecting to a small cylindrical component. The object has a modern, utilitarian look with glossy black surfaces and a fine mesh center.
description_view_0: The circular mesh disc and its thick frame are clearly visible, with the stand and green cable leading to the small cylindrical component behind.
description_view_1: The mesh disc is seen from the front, showing the fine texture and the full length of the green cable connecting to the smaller component.
description_view_2: The object is viewed from the side, highlighting the thickness of the frame and the cylindrical shape of the stand and base.
description_view_3: The back of the disc is visible, showing the smooth, solid rear surface and the green cable extending outward.
